packageRules.description: Automerge patch updates on their own (kept out of any non-major group)

Deliberately pinned to 2.86.2 in Package.swift to work around apple/swift-nio#3647 (Windows Sendable/IPPROTO compile errors) — Renovate auto-bumping this exact pin (PR #153) reintroduced the exact bug PR #149 fixed. Do not remove until upstream resolves #3647; see Package.swift comment.
